title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
CLARITY Act missed July 4 deadline — Senate delayed floor vote before recess; crypto regulatory clarity fails near-term.
XRP highest direct exposure (commodity classification remains reversible); alts face risk-off on failed catalyst.
BTC holding ~$62,167 despite delay; rate-hike odds for Sep fell to ~50% on 57K NFP miss (supportive).
Polymarket had trimmed CLARITY passage odds to 48% pre-delay — market had partially priced this.
